content.json:
# ☁️ Cloud & Hybrid Threat Correlation
---
Detects attacks spanning both Azure and on-premises. An Azure resource deletion followed by on-prem admin logon from an unusual IP followed by firewall allow from that same IP = a cloud-pivoted attack in progress.

content.query:
AzureActivity
| summarize
    TotalOps = count(),
    FailedOps = countif(ActivityStatusValue == 'Failure'),
    WriteOps = countif(ActivityStatusValue == 'Success' and OperationNameValue has_any ('write', 'create', 'delete', 'update', 'action')),
    UniqueCallers = dcount(Caller)
| project TotalOps, FailedOps, WriteOps, UniqueCallers
content.title: Azure activity summary

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where OperationNameValue has_any ('delete', 'Delete')
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, CallerIpAddress, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, _ResourceId
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30
content.title: Azure resource deletions

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where OperationNameValue has_any ('roleAssignments/write', 'vaults/secrets/write', 'networkSecurityGroups/securityRules/write', 'runCommand/action', 'Set federation')
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, CallerIpAddress, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30
content.title: High-risk Azure operations

content.query:
let AzureCallers = AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where OperationNameValue has_any ('write', 'delete', 'action')
| where isnotempty(CallerIpAddress) and CallerIpAddress != ''
| summarize AzureOpCount = count(), LastAzureOp = max(TimeGenerated)
    by CallerIP = tostring(CallerIpAddress), Caller = tolower(Caller);
let OnPremLogons = SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4624
| where LogonType in (3, 10)
| where isnotempty(IpAddress) and IpAddress != '-' and IpAddress != '127.0.0.1'
| summarize OnPremLogonCount = count(), LastOnPremLogon = max(TimeGenerated), Computers = make_set(Computer, 5)
    by CallerIP = IpAddress;
AzureCallers
| join kind=inner OnPremLogons on CallerIP
| project CallerIP, Caller, AzureOpCount, LastAzureOp, OnPremLogonCount, LastOnPremLogon, Computers
| sort by AzureOpCount desc
content.title: IPs that made Azure control plane changes AND logged into on-prem Windows — cloud-to-on-prem pivot

content.query:
let AzureCallerIPs = AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where OperationNameValue has_any ('write', 'delete', 'action')
| where isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
| summarize by CallerIpAddress;
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'Allow', 'permit', 'Permit', 'accept', 'Accept')
| where SourceIP in (AzureCallerIPs)
| summarize FWAllowCount = count(), DestIPs = make_set(DestinationIP, 5) by SourceIP
| sort by FWAllowCount desc
content.title: Azure-active IPs also seen in on-prem firewall allows

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName in ('Add member to role', 'Set federation settings on domain', 'Add application', 'Delete application')
| extend InitiatedByUPN = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatedBySP = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).app.displayName)
| extend Actor = iff(isnotempty(InitiatedByUPN), InitiatedByUPN, InitiatedBySP)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Actor, Result, LoggedByService
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30
content.title: Entra high-risk operations — role assignments, federation changes, app registrations
